title: Auto MLG/Clutch Mod
description: This is a simple auto MLG mod.
body:
# **Auto-MLG (Fabric)**
A lightweight, high-performance utility designed to save you from certain death. Whether you're falling from a sky-base or getting knocked off a cliff, this mod automates the precise timing needed to land a water bucket MLG.

# **✨ Features**
Intelligent Inventory Search: The mod scans your entire inventory (not just your hotbar) for a water bucket and automatically swaps it into your hand when you fall.

Predictive Landing: Uses your current falling velocity and server latency (ping) to calculate the exact millisecond to place the water.

Automatic Cleanup: Scoops the water back up exactly 0.5 seconds after landing and returns your original item (like your sword) to your hand.

Movement Compensation: Scans a 3x3 area around your feet to ensure the water is picked up even if you drift slightly after landing.

Camera Lock: Automatically snaps your view to the ground during a fall to ensure a successful placement.

# **⌨️ Keybindings**
Toggle Mod: Press G (default) to enable or disable the Auto-MLG logic.

# **🛠 Technical Details**
Version: 1.21.11

Platform: Fabric

Requirements: Fabric API

Note: This mod is designed for technical testing and survival assistance. Please be mindful of server rules regarding automated utilities when playing on multiplayer servers!
